tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Intro]
[tab]                             [ch]Em[/ch]
Ain't no sunshine when she's gone[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]Em[/ch]
And he likes to say no[/tab]
[tab]N.C              [ch]Em[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]
Anytime she goes aw--ay[/tab]

N.C.
Some talking then back in to chords

[ch]Em[/ch]  [ch]Em7[/ch]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Bm7[/ch]      [ch]Em[/ch]          [ch]Bm7[/ch]
My love, do you ever dream of[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em7[/ch]          [ch]F#m7[/ch]
Candy coated raindrops?[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em7[/ch]                        [ch]Bm7[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]
You're the same, my candy rain[/tab]

[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]Bm7[/ch]
Have you ever loved someone[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em7[/ch]
So much you thought you'd die?[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]
Giving so much of yourself[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
It seems the only way[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm7[/ch]
Tell me what you want and I[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em7[/ch]                    [ch]Bm7[/ch]
And I will give it to you[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm7[/ch]
Cause you are[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Bm7[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]           [ch]Bm[/ch]
My love, do you ever dream of[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]     [ch]F#m7[/ch]
Candy coated raindrops?[/tab]
[tab] [ch]F#m7[/ch]
(Oooh darling)[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]               [ch]Em[/ch]        [ch]Bm7[/ch]  [ch]F#m[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]
You're the same, my candy rain[/tab]

[Verse 2]
[tab]   [ch]Bm[/ch]
My love, did you ever dream[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
That it could be so right?[/tab]
[tab]                        [ch]F#m[/ch]
I never thought that I would find[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]         [ch]D[/ch]
All that I need in life[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm7[/ch]
All I want, all I need now, I know[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em7[/ch]                   [ch]Bm7[/ch]                [ch]Em7[/ch]
I know I found it in you, I found it in you[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em7[/ch]
Cause you are[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Bm7[/ch]                [ch]G[/ch]           [ch]Bm[/ch]                          [ch]Em[/ch]
My love, (my love) do you ever dream of (don't you want my dream)[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]G[/ch]      [ch]F#m[/ch]
Candy coated raindrops? (oooh)[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                         [ch]Bm[/ch]  [ch]F#m7[/ch]
You're the same, my candy ra--in[/tab]

[Instrumental]
[ch]G[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]
[ch]G[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]Gm[/ch]

(1 strum on each chord)
[ch]Bm7[/ch]  [ch]F#7[/ch]

(2 strums on each chord)
[ch]G7[/ch]   [ch]Bm7[/ch]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch] [ch]F#m[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]           [ch]Bm[/ch]    [ch]Em[/ch]
My love,(ooh) do you ever dream of[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]            [ch]Am[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]
Candy coated raindrops?[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                        [ch]Bm[/ch]
You're the same, my candy rain[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]Em[/ch]
You're the same, my candy rain[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]       [ch]Gm[/ch]     [ch]Bm[/ch]
My love, do you ever dream of[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#[/ch]           [ch]F#m[/ch]
Candy coated raindrops?[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]                            [ch]B[/ch]
You're the same, my candy ra--in[/tab]

[Instrumental]
|[ch]G[/ch]  |[ch]F#m[/ch]  |[ch]G[/ch]  |[ch]Bm[/ch] [ch]F#m[/ch] |

[tab][ch]D7[/ch]           [ch]F#7[/ch] [ch]Em7[/ch]
Candy coated raindrops[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]F#m7[/ch]
Candy coated raindrops[/tab]

|[ch]Em7[/ch] |[ch]Am7[/ch] [ch]D7[/ch] |[ch]E7[/ch] |[ch]Em7[/ch] |

Candy coated raindrops[/tab]

|[ch]Em7[/ch] |[ch]F#m7[/ch] |[ch]Em7[/ch] |
